_comment: One config per crane. Fill the text fields and point the three asset filenames at files in the assets/ folder (or absolute paths). Specs are pasted here, not scraped.
title: HIAB 425K Drywall Crane
subtitle: on a new Kenworth T880 Tri-Axle
specs_for_copy: Lifting capacity 9,000 lb @ 69'8" vertical; 4 hydraulic extensions; 71'5" vertical outreach; HIAB XSDrive radio remotes; Space X4 electronic safety system; auxiliary legs; full-perimeter FTLS LED safety light system; rear HD camera; boom-stowed alert. Truck: new Kenworth T880 Tri-Axle; Cummins X15 475 hp; Allison 4500RDS automatic; 24'6" steel drywall deck with full-length torsion box; 80,000 lb GVW; air ride.
_photo_note: Optional: supply a purpose-shot vertical and/or square image for better framing. If omitted, the landscape photo above is cropped to fit. The thumbnail always uses the landscape photo.
_voiceover_note: Two modes. voiceover_source='file' uses the supplied audio file below (manual flow, e.g. from Canva). voiceover_source='elevenlabs' generates the MP3 from the approved 'script' via ElevenLabs (voice_id/tts_model optional; default to env vars).
script: From Atlas Polar — your work-ready HIAB boom truck package. Meet the HIAB four twenty-five K Drywall Crane, mounted on a new Kenworth T eight eighty tri-axle. It lifts nine thousand pounds with over seventy-one feet of reach, and comes fully equipped with radio remotes, electronic safety systems, auxiliary legs, LED safety lighting, and a rear camera. Underneath, a Cummins-powered Kenworth with an Allison automatic and a twenty-four-and-a-half-foot steel drywall deck. This work-ready package is available now. Call Atlas Polar at six four seven, two nine zero, two seven six four, or visit atlas polar dot com.
